reasoning: The question requires estimating the probability that the daily average temperature in Rouen on a future winter date (assumed to be the close date, 2026-01-24) will be higher than on late October (2025-10-26). Historically, the expected daily average temperature in late October in Rouen is approximately 10.1 °C, and for late January it is approximately 4.5 °C. The difference between the two dates has a mean of around -5.6 °C. The standard deviation for daily average temperatures in both months is roughly 3.0 to 3.5 °C, giving a combined standard deviation for the difference of about 4.6 °C. Using a normal distribution to approximate this yields a Z-score of -1.21, which corresponds to roughly an 11% chance that the January date will be warmer than the October date due to natural weather variance.
